transcript: GPM is an international satellite mission providing a new generation of observations of a rain and snow in all parts of the world every three hours. If you have good precipitation information, you can do a very good job of characterizing drought and often it's subsequent impact on agricultural productivity. There's about one major flood a day some place in the world, so it's not as if it's a rare event.
